surroundingText: The final unity is not identical to the first unity because it now contains conscious relationship. Expanded: [ 1 rightarrow Many rightarrow 1' rightarrow Many' rightarrow 1'' ] A circle repeats. A spiral remembers. F031 — Dynamic Toroidal FlowToroidal flow is shown as circulation through center, boundary, return, and renewed emergence.F031-dynamic-toroidal-flow Fibonacci and Recursive Emergence The Fibonacci sequence is defined by: [ F_n = F_n-1+F_n-2 ] This is established mathematics. The FHQCM uses Fibonacci recursion symbolically to show how new forms may emerge from prior relationship.
